good hearted people'. Yes, as you and I know it suits you
well. That essentially means that the BT could be between
5.15 AM to 5.30 AM. But let us not be that sure, we will use
the possible mathematical methods before coming to a
conclusion.

Next part :Step 2 - BT by Mathematical methods
1) Pancha Tatva Method.
First let us broadly locate the birth time using the Pancha
Tatva method. Then we could use the Varga chathushtaya
method to verify whether it is correct or not.
Sunrise Time: 6.01 AM (Tip of the sun truly on the eastern
horizon) Sunset Time : 6.31 PM (Previous day)
Day Time Duration (Night): 6.
